# MathSolver

> MathSolver is an AI-powered math solving tool available as a Chrome extension. Students take a screenshot of any math problem and get instant step-by-step solutions.

## Site Structure

- Homepage: https://mathsolver.cloud/
- Chrome Extension: https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/math-solver/pieobakkfhafplomcoiohhpikcofoghb

## Solver Pages (Pillar Pages)

These are comprehensive guides for each math topic:

- [Ai Math Solver](https://mathsolver.cloud/ai-math-solver/)
- [Algebra Solver](https://mathsolver.cloud/algebra-solver/)
- [Calculus Solver](https://mathsolver.cloud/calculus-solver/)
- [Equation Solver](https://mathsolver.cloud/equation-solver/)
- [Fractions Calculator](https://mathsolver.cloud/fractions-calculator/)
- [Geometry Solver](https://mathsolver.cloud/geometry-solver/)
- [Math Word Problem Solver](https://mathsolver.cloud/math-word-problem-solver/)
- [Matrix Solver](https://mathsolver.cloud/matrix-solver/)
- [Online Math Calculator](https://mathsolver.cloud/online-math-calculator/)
- [Physics Solver](https://mathsolver.cloud/physics-solver/)
- [Statistics Solver](https://mathsolver.cloud/statistics-solver/)
- [Trigonometry Solver](https://mathsolver.cloud/trigonometry-solver/)
